title: Path LMS Reporting API Credentials
description: Path LMS Reporting API two-step authentication credentials. applicationId and applicationSecret are exchanged at /api/v1/getToken for a 12-hour bearer token. Credentials are issued by Blue Sky eLearn; contact your CSM to obtain them.

applicationId.description: Client ID issued by Blue Sky eLearn (referred to as 'ClientID' in the Path LMS docs). Used in the x-www-form-urlencoded token request body.
applicationId.title: Application ID (Client ID)

applicationSecret.description: Client Secret issued by Blue Sky eLearn. Used alongside applicationId in the token request body.
applicationSecret.title: Application Secret (Client Secret)
